title: OpenLink Frpc API
description:
An API that provides Frpc interface for developers to use.
You can simply provide a frp service for the mod OpenLink.
body:
# OpenLink Frpc API

It provides something for development like the Frpc interface.

It is made for mods to depend on to provide a frp service.

If you are a player, you should download [OpenLink](https://modrinth.com/mod/openlink) instead of this mod.

作为玩家，你不应该下载这个模组，而应下载[OpenLink](https://modrinth.com/mod/openlink)。
